name: io.github.threadlinqs-cmd/intelthreadlinqs-mcp
description: Threadlinqs threat-intelligence MCP — 49 tools: threats, detections, IOCs, actors, C2, MITRE, CVEs

environmentVariables.description: Threadlinqs API key (Purple or Gold tier, tl_...) — get one at https://intel.threadlinqs.com/profile
environmentVariables.name: THREADLINQS_API_KEY

environmentVariables.description: Override the API base URL (defaults to https://intel.threadlinqs.com)
environmentVariables.name: THREADLINQS_API_URL
